name: Air Max Fury "Neon"
description: Take your street style to the stratosphere. The Air Max Fury features futuristic neon accents, dual-density foam midsoles, and transparent mesh styling. Perfect for urban explorers demanding premium comfort and unmatched aesthetics.

reviews.comment: Hands down the comfiest sneakers I have ever owned! The neon looks incredibly vibrant in person.
Very stylish, although they fit slightly snug. Recommend half size up.

name: GenZ Oversized Cyber Hoodie
description: Elevate your off-duty looks with our heavyweight, ultra-soft fleece cyber hoodie. Boxy oversized fit with minimal cybernetic print on the sleeves, premium metal aglets, and dropped shoulders.

reviews.comment: Extremely cozy and has that perfect heavy drape. Will buy the other colors too!

name: Chrono Smartwatch X-1
description: A masterpiece of wearable technology. The X-1 features an immersive always-on AMOLED display, futuristic customizable watchfaces, biometric wellness scanning, and a aerospace-grade titanium casing. Dynamic 7-day battery life.

name: Sonic Pods Pro Active
description: Immersive sound with next-generation adaptive active noise cancellation. Enjoy deep bass, crystal-clear high frequencies, and low-latency spatial audio designed specifically for high-intensity gaming and outdoor exploration.

name: Urban Explorer Tech Backpack
description: The ultimate weather-resistant commuter backpack. Featuring an isolated laptop vault, expandable storage pockets, modular magnetic strap attachment ports, and high-visibility reflective detailing for night walks.

name: Viper Sunset Shades
description: Channel retro-futurism with these wrap-around sunset glasses. Crafted with polarized UV400 lenses and shatterproof polycarbonate frames. Sleek aerodynamic fit that sits comfortably.

name: Alpha Carbon Runner V2
description: Engineered with an ultra-light carbon fiber speedplate and nitrogen-infused energy rebound midsoles. Made for setting personal records and turning heads on the track.

name: Cyberpunk Cargo Utility Pants
description: Multi-pocket tactical design constructed with quick-dry ripstop fabric. Adjustable ankle straps, metal carabiner attachments, and loose-fit comfort suited for streetwear enthusiasts.

name: Retro Puff-Glow Puffer Jacket
description: The ultimate cold-weather streetwear weapon. High-shine ripstop shell packed with cloud-like thermal insulation. Features a removable hooded balaclava, interior gear harnesses, and sleek reflective logo branding.

reviews.comment: Absolutely spectacular puffer jacket! Keeps me incredibly warm and gets so many compliments.

name: Vintage Washed Graphic Heavy Tee
description: Constructed from 300GSM ultra-dense organic combed cotton. Heavily washed for that authentic vintage patina and drape. Features a premium screen-printed abstract futuristic design on the back.

name: Modular Techwear Utility Vest
description: Engineered with water-repellent Cordura fabric and modular MOLLE attachment points. Multiple magnetic fidlock buckle pockets, breathable dual-layer mesh lining, and adjustable chest harness straps.

name: Urban Fleece Windbreaker
description: Ultra-cozy fleece lining merged with a water-resistant ripstop storm shell. Two-tone futuristic colorway with dynamic color block panels, high-rise collar, and dual zip utility vents.

name: Acid-Wash Distressed Jeans
description: Heavyweight premium denim designed in a relaxed, straight-leg style. Finished with subtle hand-distressed detailing, custom silver hardware, and signature double-knee reinforcement panels.

name: Vanguard High-Top Sneakers
description: Premium high-top sneaker fusing high-fashion aesthetics with technical streetwear durability. Handcrafted with full-grain leather, dual zipper details, dynamic neon heel tags, and responsive combat outsole grips.

name: Streetwear Corduroy Bucket Hat
description: Soft, chunky wide-wale corduroy bucket hat in a vintage olive green. Features an embroidered minimalist logo, moisture-wicking internal sweatband, and adjustable bungee utility drawcord.

name: Apex Noise-Cancelling Headset
description: Over-ear smart headphones with custom aerospace aluminium earcups, hybrid active noise cancellation, and a dynamic signature bass response. Sleek cyberpunk aesthetic with glowing status accents.
